get.description: Get generic information about the Protect application
Get detailed information about a specific viewer

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific viewer

get.description: Get detailed information about all viewers
Get detailed information about a specific live view

patch.description: Patch the configuration about a specific live view

get.description: Get detailed information about all live views
A WebSocket subscription which broadcasts all changes happening to Protect-managed hardware devices
A WebSocket subscription that broadcasts Protect events

schema.description: An event that was created or updated

parameters.name: slot
parameters.description: The slot number (0-4) of the patrol that is currently running, or null if no patrol is running

204.description: The camera PTZ patrol was started successfully.
The camera PTZ patrol was stopped successfully.

post.description: Adjust the PTZ camera position to a specified preset

parameters.name: slot
parameters.description: Which slot this preset belongs to (-1 home preset, >=0 other presets).

schema.description: Which slot this preset belongs to (-1 home preset, >=0 other presets).

204.description: The PTZ camera was moved to the given preset successfully.

post.summary: Send a webhook to the alarm manager
post.description: Send a webhook to the alarm manager to trigger configured alarms

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User defined string used to trigger only specific alarms. Alarm should be configured with the same ID to be triggered.

204.description: Webhook was sent to alarm manager successfully

get.description: Get a list of all arm profiles. Only available when using local alarm manager.

post.description: Create a new arm profile. Only available when using local alarm manager.

patch.description: Set the current arm profile to be used when enabling the arm alarm. Only available when using local alarm manager.
Update an existing arm profile. Only available when using local alarm manager.

delete.description: Delete an arm profile by ID. Only available when using local alarm manager.

post.description: Enable the arm alarm feature using the currently selected arm profile. Only available when using local alarm manager.
Disable the arm alarm feature. Only available when using local alarm manager.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific light

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific light

get.description: Get detailed information about all lights
Get detailed information about a specific camera

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific camera

lcdMessage.description: Message that's set on the LCD screen (for doorbells and/or other devices with LCD screens). To upload image assets for the LCD screen, use the `/files/{fileType}` endpoint.

x-enum-descriptions: Recommended, the system automatically adjusts the HDR level.
Forces HDR to be always enabled as the highest level.

smartDetectSettings.description: Smart detection settings for the camera.
smartDetectSettings.title: smartDetectSettings

get.description: Get detailed information about all cameras

post.description: Returns RTSPS stream URLs for specified quality levels

delete.description: Remove the RTSPS stream for a specified camera

parameters.name: qualities
parameters.description: The array of quality levels for the RTSPS streams to be removed. All qualities (high, medium, low) are available for all cameras. The package quality is only available for cameras with hasPackageCamera: true.

get.description: Returns existing RTSPS stream URLs for camera
Get a snapshot image from a specific camera. Use channel=package for cameras with a package camera (hasPackageCamera: true).

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Camera channel to capture snapshot from. Use "package" for cameras with a package camera (hasPackageCamera: true).

parameters.name: highQuality
parameters.description: Whether to force 1080P or higher resolution snapshot

503.description: The camera is offline or not reachable.

post.description: Disable the microphone for a specific camera. This action cannot be undone unless the camera is reset.
Returns the talkback stream URL and audio configuration for a specific camera

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific sensor

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific sensor

409.description: This operation is not supported for this sensor

get.description: Get detailed information about all sensors
Get detailed information about a specific siren

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific siren

get.description: Get detailed information about all sirens

post.description: Activate the siren alarm for the specified duration. The siren status will be tracked and can be stopped early using the stop endpoint.

duration.description: Duration of the siren activation in seconds. Defaults to 5 seconds.

post.description: Test the siren sound for 5 seconds at the specified volume.

volume.description: The volume for testing the siren sound. Defaults to the configured device volume.

204.description: The siren sound test was initiated successfully.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific fob

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific fob

get.description: Get detailed information about all fobs
Get detailed information about a specific relay

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific relay

get.description: Get detailed information about all relays

post.description: Control a relay output state. Use "state" to set a specific state (on/off), or omit to toggle. When state is "on", you can optionally provide "pulseDuration" to auto-turn off after the specified milliseconds.

state.description: Desired output state. If omitted, toggles the current state.

pulseDuration.description: Auto-off duration in milliseconds (only applies when state is "on"). If greater than 0, the output auto-turns off after the specified duration.

204.description: The relay output activation was initiated successfully.

503.description: The relay is offline or not reachable.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific speaker

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific speaker

get.description: Get detailed information about all speakers

post.description: Test the speaker sound at the specified volume.

volume.description: The volume for testing the speaker sound. Defaults to the configured device volume.

204.description: The speaker sound test was initiated successfully.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific bridge

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific bridge

get.description: Get detailed information about all bridges
Get detailed information about a specific link station (non-alarm hub gateways)

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific link station

get.description: Get detailed information about all link stations (non-alarm hub gateways)
Get detailed information about a specific alarm hub

patch.description: Patch the settings for a specific alarm hub

get.description: Get detailed information about all alarm hubs

post.description: Trigger an alarm hub output channel. Can be used to turn on/off connected devices like sirens, lights, or other actuators.

enable.description: Set to true to turn on, false to turn off. If omitted, toggles the current state.

delay.description: Delay in milliseconds before the output activates

duration.description: Duration in milliseconds to keep the output active. 0 means indefinite until manually turned off.

204.description: The output trigger was initiated successfully.

503.description: The alarm hub is offline or not reachable.

get.description: Get detailed information about the NVR

post.description: Upload a new device asset file

schema.description: A binary file with one of these MIME types: image/gif, image/jpeg, image/png, audio/mpeg, audio/mp4, audio/wave, audio/x-caf}

get.description: Get a list of all device asset files

cameraIds.description: The list of (doorbell-only) cameras which this chime is paired to.

ringSettings.description: List of custom ringtone settings for (doorbell-only) cameras paired to this chime.

get.description: Get detailed information about all chimes
Get detailed information about a specific Protect user.
Get all Protect users. Users are filtered based on access permissions.

cause.description: An optional nested cause for the parent error

viewerModelKey.description: The model key of the viewer

mac.description: The primary MAC address of the device.

streamLimit.description: Count of maximum supported parallel live streams.

name.description: The name of this live view.

isDefault.description: Whether this live view is the default one for all viewers.

isGlobal.description: Whether this live view is global and available system-wide to all users

layout.description: The number of slots this live view contains. Which as a consequence also affects the layout of the live view.

cycleMode.description: Whether to switch to next camera in slot based on motion events or a strict time interval

cycleInterval.description: How long should each camera stream be shown for in seconds until we cycle to the next camera

items.description: Which cameras will be visible in a given slot and how will they be cycled through

slots.description: List of cameras visible in each given slot. And cycling settings for each slot if it has multiple cameras listed.

liveviewModelKey.description: The model key of the liveview
liveviewModelKey.title: liveviewModelKey

ulpId.description: The unique id of the UniFi Identity user. Matches the id field of the corresponding UlpUser. Matches the ucoreUserId field of the corresponding Protect User. Null if the credential was not recognized.

start.description: Unix timestamp of the start time of the event.

end.description: Unix timestamp of the end time of the event.

fingerprintIdentifiedEvent.description: A fingerprint was scanned at a device
fingerprintIdentifiedEvent.title: fingerprintIdentifiedEvent

ulpId.description: The unique id of the UniFi Identity user. Matches the id field of the corresponding UlpUser. Matches the ucoreUserId field of the corresponding Protect User. Null if the credential was not recognized.

activePatrolSlotString.title: activePatrolSlotString
activePatrolSlotString.description: The slot number (0-4) of the patrol that is currently running, or null if no patrol is running

alarmTriggerId.description: User defined string used to trigger only specific alarms. Alarm should be configured with the same ID to be triggered.
alarmTriggerId.title: alarmTriggerId

cause.description: An optional nested cause for the parent error

automations.title: automations
automations.description: List of automation IDs associated with this arm profile.

armScheduleStart.title: armScheduleStart
armScheduleStart.description: Cron expression for the start time.

armScheduleEnd.title: armScheduleEnd
armScheduleEnd.description: Cron expression for the end time.

recordEverything.title: recordEverything
recordEverything.description: Whether to record everything when this arm profile is active.

activationDelay.title: activationDelay
activationDelay.description: Activation delay in milliseconds. Allowed values: 0 (none), 60000 (1 min), 300000 (5 min), 600000 (10 min).

resetAt.description: UNIX timestamp when doorbell message should be removed (if not set then `nvr.doorbellSettings.defaultMessageResetTimeoutMs` is used, if set to `null` then interpreted as "forever")

oneOf.description: Show a pre-defined "do not disturb" message on the doorbell

resetAt.description: UNIX timestamp when doorbell message should be removed (if not set then `nvr.doorbellSettings.defaultMessageResetTimeoutMs` is used, if set to `null` then interpreted as "forever")

oneOf.description: Show a pre-defined "leave package at door" message on the doorbell

resetAt.description: UNIX timestamp when doorbell message should be removed (if not set then `nvr.doorbellSettings.defaultMessageResetTimeoutMs` is used, if set to `null` then interpreted as "forever")

text.description: The custom text message to show on the doorbell

oneOf.description: Show a custom text message on the doorbell

resetAt.description: UNIX timestamp when doorbell message should be removed (if not set then `nvr.doorbellSettings.defaultMessageResetTimeoutMs` is used, if set to `null` then interpreted as "forever")

text.description: The ID of the custom image to show on the doorbell

oneOf.description: Show a custom image on the doorbell

createdQualities.description: Array of quality levels of RTSPS streams. All qualities (high, medium, low) are available for all cameras. The package quality is only available for cameras with hasPackageCamera: true.
createdQualities.title: createdQualities

createdRtspsStreams.description: The RTSPS stream URLs for the camera
createdRtspsStreams.title: createdRtspsStreams

removedQualities.description: The array of quality levels for the RTSPS streams to be removed. All qualities (high, medium, low) are available for all cameras. The package quality is only available for cameras with hasPackageCamera: true.
removedQualities.title: removedQualities

existingRtspsStreams.description: The RTSPS stream URLs for the camera. All qualities (high, medium, low) are available for all cameras. The package quality is only available for cameras with hasPackageCamera: true.
existingRtspsStreams.title: existingRtspsStreams

snapshotChannel.description: Camera channel to capture snapshot from. Use "package" for cameras with a package camera (hasPackageCamera: true).
snapshotChannel.title: channel

forceHighQuality.description: Whether to force 1080P or higher resolution snapshot
forceHighQuality.title: forceHighQuality

sirenDurationSeconds.description: Duration of the siren activation in seconds.
sirenDurationSeconds.title: sirenDurationSeconds

fileName.description: Unique ID for the asset file

fileOriginalName.description: Original filename of the uploaded file

filePath.description: Path to the file on the filesystem

ucoreUserId.description: The unique id of the UniFi Identity user. Matches the id field of the corresponding UlpUser.

userModelKey.description: The model key of the user

firstName.description: The first name of ulp user
